name: Chocolate Bourbon Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Place margarine in a medium bowl. Microwave at HIGH (100%) until melted, 1 to 2 minutes. Mix in powdered sugar, nuts, and bourbon. Refrigerate until firm.
2. Shape into 1-inch balls. Refrigerate until firm. Combine chocolate chips and half-and-half in a small bowl. Microwave at MEDIUM-HIGH (70%) until chocolate chips are melted, 1 to 2-1/2 minutes, stirring once or twice. Stir until smooth. Drizzle chocolate over candies. Reheat chocolate as needed. Chill.
The picture shows them sitting in little paper candy cups.
